
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; MeTTa allows to use a separate knowledge base (Space) &kb
;;; to accumulate inferred knowledge
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; Bind &kb to a new empty Space
  !(bind! &kb 
    (new-space))

[

Deterministic: ()
()]
;;; Some knowledge
  (= 
    (frog $x) 
    (and 
      (croaks $x) 
      (eat_flies $x)))
  (= 
    (croaks Fritz) True)
  (= 
    (eat_flies Fritz) True)
  (= 
    (croaks Sam) True)
  (= 
    (eat_flies Sam) True)
  (= 
    (green $x) 
    (frog $x))
;;; Define conditional
  (: ift 
    (-> Bool Atom Atom))
  (= 
    (ift True $then) $then)
;;; For anything that is green, assert it is Green in &kb
;;; There should be two green things
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (ift 
      (green $x) 
      (add-atom &kb 
        (Green $x))) 
    (() ()))

[

;
;; HYPERON-EXPERIMENTAL-SCRIPTS.E1-KB-WRITE.01

  (Green Fritz)
  (Green Sam)
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.005 secs. (4.59 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (ift 
      (green $x) 
      (add-atom &kb 
        (Green $x))) 
    (() ()))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (() ()) 
      (() ())))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5834))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (ift 
            (green $_3784) 
            (add-atom &kb 
              (Green $_3784))) 
          (() ())) $_3550) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3974) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3550 $_4002) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4002)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5834))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (ift 
            (green $_3784) 
            (add-atom &kb 
              (Green $_3784))) 
          (() ())) $_3550) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3974) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3550 $_4002) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4002)))))
